name: ecommerce-platform-workspace
description: Workspace scripts for running ecommerce microservices

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix api-gateway && npm install --prefix services/user-service && npm install --prefix services/product-service && npm install --prefix services/cart-service && npm install --prefix services/order-service && npm install --prefix services/payment-service
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n gateway,user,product,cart,order,payment,frontend -c yellow,cyan,green,blue,magenta,red,white "npm run dev --prefix api-gateway" "npm run dev --prefix services/user-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/product-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/cart-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/order-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/payment-service" "http-server frontend -p 8080 -c-1"
scripts.start: concurrently -k -n gateway,user,product,cart,order,payment,frontend -c yellow,cyan,green,blue,magenta,red,white "npm run start --prefix api-gateway" "npm run start --prefix services/user-service" "npm run start --prefix services/product-service" "npm run start --prefix services/cart-service" "npm run start --prefix services/order-service" "npm run start --prefix services/payment-service" "http-server frontend -p 8080 -c-1"
